label: yes
cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out this problem step by step. So Jane booked a flight for tomorrow, which is July 29, 2002. The question is asking for the date one week ago from today in MM/DD/YYYY format. The options are given, so maybe I can check them after working it out. First, if the flight is booked for tomorrow, then "today" must be the day before that. So if tomorrow is July 29, 2002, then today is July 28, 2002. Now, we need to find the date one week ago from today. A week ago would be subtracting seven days from July 28, 2002. Let me count backward. Starting from July 28: - July 28 minus 1 day is July 27 - July 28 minus 2 days is July 26 - July 28 minus 3 days is July 25 - July 28 minus 4 days is July 24 - July 28 minus 5 days is July 23 - July 28 minus 6 days is July 22 - July 28 minus 7 days is July 21 So, one week before July 28 would be July 21, 2002. Let me check if that's one of the options. Looking at the options, (E) is 07/21/2002. That seems to be the answer. Wait, but let me make sure I didn't make a mistake. Let me verify the dates again. July has 31 days, right? So subtracting 7 days from July 28 would definitely land on July 21. There's no month change here because 28 minus 7 is 21. So yes, July 21, 2002. That's option E.
